data.body: Tier E progress (2026-06-14): E0–E4 DONE (reads, leaf writes, write/lifecycle trio, compact, scratch, delete, fsck, fsck-recover, init all in-process; auto-init consent gate added). E5–E9 remain (bridge cmds + reconciler rewire w/ LIVE-DIG Jira gate, shim deletion, dispatcher deletion, .sh->pytest, docs+close). PR #4 (env-bound manifest signing) merged into main @ eda41cc7 — SIGNATURE event + signature close-gate now live; integration verified. Full handoff on kickoff child lad-cipher-arena.
